reason: Task goal, boundaries, acceptance criteria, and evidence requirements for this implementation round.
Global TianChen-RV MLIR invariants, source-of-truth, and descriptor-driven computation prohibition.
Core dialect boundary: tcrv.exec stays execution-envelope-only and must not gain RVV compute semantics.
RVV selected finite-binary family body, descriptor mirror, EmitC intrinsic route, and ssh evidence contracts.
Generic plugin registry and target-support hook boundaries; no core family-specific branches.
Common EmitC lowerable route and generated op-interface source authority boundary.
Target artifact export, runtime ABI, selected-config/runtime-VL, and bundle coherence contracts.
Focused lit/C++/artifact/RVV evidence expectations for compiler and RVV source-emission changes.
Previous completed route-activation baseline and exact dynamic vsub/vadd artifact/evidence commands.
Previous RVV target-support bundle ownership baseline and route regression scope.
Selected-config/runtime-VL fail-closed validation baseline to preserve.
Generated RVV source/header artifacts now document descriptor mirrors as compatibility/diagnostic only after typed RVV body authority.
Dynamic vsub regression now asserts selected typed EmitC source op metadata, common EmitC route provenance, vsub intrinsic mapping, and stale descriptor fail-closed behavior.
Dynamic vadd regression now asserts selected typed EmitC source op metadata, common EmitC route provenance, vadd intrinsic mapping, and stale descriptor fail-closed behavior.
Direct source/header/object artifacts prove vsub/vadd typed source-op comments, descriptor mirror status, and intrinsic mappings.
Plan-and-export bundles prove direct and bundle routes agree on source/header/object route metadata and descriptor mirror status.
Fresh ssh rvv evidence for dynamic i32-vsub bundle source/object correctness at runtime counts 7, 16, and 23.
